CustomField.description: Salesforce ContentDocumentId (18-char) of the signed ROD, FONSI, or CE Determination document. Salesforce does not support Lookup fields to ContentDocument or ContentVersion — this Text field stores the ID for programmatic retrieval via ContentDocumentLink or SOQL on ContentVersion where ContentDocumentId = this value.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: ContentDocumentId of the signed decision document. Query ContentVersion WHERE ContentDocumentId = this value to retrieve the file.
CustomField.label: Decision Document ID
